items.title: Local renderers make briefing pages repeatable
items.summary: A local helper renderer turns reviewed Structured Synthesis into repeatable Briefing Pages without making web or api own artifact generation.
items.content_text: The renderer accepts reviewed structured inputs, writes a complete local HTML artifact, and keeps source citations in a footer index. It should not call the FeedContext API.

items.title: Audio Briefs move through script and segment manifests
items.summary: Audio Brief generation now requires a reviewed Show Script before segment manifests and final audio review.
items.content_text: The recommended path is Structured Synthesis, Synthesis Review, Show Script, Script Review, segment manifest, provider rendering, final assembly, and Final Audio Review.

items.title: Behavior evals should replay independent agent runs
items.summary: Skill behavior evals are most useful when a fresh agent follows the installed skill and produces traceable artifacts.
items.content_text: Golden traces are useful references, but the acceptance signal comes from a new independent agent run graded against an expected output contract.
